## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and upcoming content plans.](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Templates and safety/compliance content performing well; focus on practical, actionable content](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [AI/LLM content visibility becoming increasingly important; need to explore tracking options](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Open enrollment templates identified as key opportunity for Q4](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Aiming to improve conversion rate to 1%; need to analyze funnel data for insights](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Safety and compliance cluster showing strong growth (514 sessions vs. 800+ for cross-functional communication)](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Templates subcluster performing exceptionally well, confirming user preference for practical content](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Workforce management subcluster (including scheduling) showing unexpected growth](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Internal communication subcluster had surprising spike; warrants further investigation](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Manufacturing industry content showing consistent \~35% engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### AI and LLM Strategy

  - [Received 4+ conversions from LLM sources recently](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Exploring SEMrush AI SEO toolkit for brand mention tracking across LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Current Looker dashboard shows AI-based sessions, but accuracy needs verification](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [FAQ schema potentially helping with LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### Content Planning

  - [Focusing on use case-driven content (e.g., emergency alerts, call-offs, translations)](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Adding open enrollment template content for Q4 opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=2027.0)
  - [Enriching existing open enrollment content with more depth and templates](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)
  - [Upcoming content includes AI prompt guide, employee activities, and "true cost" topics](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization

  - [Current goal is to improve conversion rate to 1%](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Need to analyze funnel data to identify potential disconnects](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Kyle to provide expertise on interpreting data and improving conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/t5AdukWpwa4MvgmjzF5-gxvdEdaPfiGF?tab=summary&timestamp=2624.0)
